name: pgw-mock
description: Noria Payments API Mock — orchestrates the independent api/ and dashboard/ apps

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta "pnpm --dir api dev" "pnpm --dir dashboard dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --dir dashboard build && pnpm --dir api build
scripts.start: SERVE_DASHBOARD=true DASHBOARD_DIST=../dashboard/dist AUTH_BASE_URL=http://localhost:4200 AUTH_TRUSTED_ORIGINS=http://localhost:4200,http://127.0.0.1:4200 pnpm --dir api start
scripts.install:all: pnpm --dir api install && pnpm --dir dashboard install
